tagline.zh: 影視製作流程平台 · 沉浸式系統 · 解決方案
tagline.en: Film production workflows platform · Immersive systems · Solutions

about.zh: 擅長問題拆解與解決方案設計。十餘年橫跨影視製作與軟體工程。系統設計、產品開發、沉浸式互動與 AI 工作流。
about.en: Skilled in problem decomposition and solution design. Over a decade spanning film production and software engineering. System architecture, product development, immersive interaction, and AI workflows.

lead.zh: 影視製作與檔案管理解決方案——把製作現場的流程、檔案與工具串成可運作的系統。
lead.en: Film production and asset management solutions—wiring on-set workflows, files, and tools into systems that actually run.

lead.zh: 線下沉浸式體驗系統——互動、敘事與現場工程的交會。
lead.en: Offline immersive experience systems—where interaction, narrative, and live engineering meet.

lead.zh: 產品型 iOS App——從體驗設計到後端與推播，端到端可運行。
lead.en: Product-shaped iOS apps—from experience design through backend and push, runnable end to end.

lead.zh: 小工具、Chrome 擴充與實驗——解決具體小問題的快速作品。
lead.en: Utilities, Chrome extensions, and experiments—quick work that solves concrete small problems.

blurb.zh: 影視製作／智能歸檔系統 / 整合插件。
blurb.en: Film production / intelligent asset management system / integrated plugins.

role.zh: 系統設計 · 整合開發 · 工具

blurb.zh: 沉浸式體驗劇場——互動、敘事與現場工程的交會。
blurb.en: Immersive experience theater—where interaction, narrative, and live engineering meet.

blurb.zh: 沉浸式體驗劇場——互動、敘事與現場工程的交會。
blurb.en: Immersive experience theater—where interaction, narrative, and live engineering meet.

blurb.zh: 沉浸式體驗劇場——互動、敘事與現場工程的交會。
blurb.en: Immersive experience theater—where interaction, narrative, and live engineering meet.

blurb.zh: 語音陪伴與互助平台——原生 iOS、即時語音、點數帳本與多語言。
blurb.en: Voice companionship and mutual-aid platform—native iOS, realtime voice, points ledger, and multilingual.

blurb.zh: 毅力表——追蹤、記錄與激勵。
blurb.en: The Tenacity Table—tracking, recording, and激励.

blurb.zh: 輕量陪伴數位替身App——輕量陪伴、數位替身與情感支持。
blurb.en: Lightweight companion digital surrogate app—lightweight companionship, digital surrogate, and emotional support.

blurb.zh: 小工具與 Chrome 擴充等（即將整理上架）。
blurb.en: Utilities, Chrome extensions, and more (coming soon).
